title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 172.345 - Veterans Day, public holiday for University employees
text:
172.345.  Veterans Day, public holiday for University employees. — The eleventh day of November of each year shall be a public holiday for all employees of the University of Missouri system in observance of Veterans Day.  When the eleventh day of November falls on a Saturday or Sunday, the Monday next following shall be considered the public holiday.
(L. 2025 H.B. 419)
